name: Make-Ahead Spaghetti and Meatball Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 12x8-inch (2-quart) baking dish. In the greased dish, combine spaghetti, water and spaghetti sauce; mix well. Add meatballs; turn to coat with sauce. (Cover spaghetti completely with sauce.) Seal tightly with foil; refrigerate at least 8 hours or overnight.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Bake, covered, for 45 minutes.
3. Remove foil from baking dish; sprinkle with cheese. Bake, uncovered, an additional 5 to 10 minutes or until casserole is bubbly and cheese is melted. Sprinkle with parsley.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
350 Calories, 13 g Fat, 830 mg Sodium
